title: Build JSON execution packets

verification_commands.command: /usr/bin/env -i PATH=/usr/bin:/bin python3 scripts/build-execution-packets.py generated/task_graph.normalized.json --packet-dir generated/execution_packets --manifest generated/execution_manifest.json
verification_commands.output: build-execution-packets: wrote 7 packet(s) to generated/execution_packets and manifest generated/execution_manifest.json

verification_commands.command: for f in generated/execution_packets/*.json; do jq -e 'has("packet_schema_version") and has("generated_at") and has("source_graph_uri") and has("task_id") and has("paths") and has("cell") and has("verification_gate") and has("rollback_plan") and has("proof_uri") and ((has("goal") or has("next_action") or has("source_columns")) | not)' "$f" >/dev/null || exit 1; done
verification_commands.output: packet field/prose checks passed for 7 files

checks.name: ready_tasks_packaged
checks.detail: Execution manifest includes one packet for each normalized ready task: LPS-012 through LPS-018.

checks.name: required_packet_fields_present
checks.detail: Every packet includes task_id, paths, cell, verification_gate, rollback_plan, proof_uri, source_graph_uri, generated_at, and packet_schema_version.

checks.name: doc_prose_excluded
checks.detail: Packets omit goal, next_action, and source_columns.

checks.name: manifest_checksums_present
checks.detail: Manifest records a sha256 for every generated packet.

drift_or_blockers: Ready task packets include LPS-012 and LPS-013 because the live normalized graph still marks those sheet rows Ready even though local proof records now exist.
LPS-014 preserves the MVP boundary and does not expand into Hermes, Odysseus, full company hierarchy, or standalone Mirofish.
